title: Reinforcement Learning Obstacle Avoidance Cycle
description: A flowchart illustrating the continuous decision-making cycle of an RL agent learning to navigate an environment while avoiding obstacles.
elements: Reward Signal (e.g., +10 for progress, -100 for collision)
relationships: Agent selects an Action based on its policy
Action is executed in the Environment
Environment provides a Reward and new Updated State
Agent uses Reward to update its policy for future decisions
